name: MfaMessagingRequest
description: MfaMessagingRequest schema from Bandwidth mfa API

from.description: The Bandwidth phone number to send the SMS from, in E.164 format

to.description: The destination phone number to send the MFA code to, in E.164 format

applicationId.description: The ID of the Bandwidth messaging application to use for sending the SMS

scope.description: An optional field to denote what scope or action the MFA code is for. This is returned during verification.

message.description: The message template to send. Use {CODE} as a placeholder for the generated MFA code.

digits.description: The number of digits in the generated MFA code (4-8)

expirationTimeInMinutes.description: The time in minutes before the MFA code expires (1-15, default 3 minutes)
